name: Italian Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream butter and shortening until smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, then mix in buttermilk, vanilla, baking soda, and sifted flour alternately with the coconut.
5. Fold in chopped pecans.
6. Pour into greased cake pan(s).
7. Bake until golden brown and toothpick inserted comes clean.
8. Allow to cool completely before removing from pan.
